Guys, I'm dying.

Whoever took a two year medical program and decided to finish it in under 16 weeks should be evaluated by a psychiatrist. (It's me)

Anyway.... yeah I couldnt decide if I wanted him to be soft or violent, so have both?

The Bull of Crete is a play (by name only) on the myth of the sire of the Minotaur. Pasiphae was a freeeeek.

Essentially, youre a priest/ess of aphrodite and you were stolen from your temple in the Acrocorinth. He intends to take you back to Crete and build a new temple there in honor of her and to make amends for taking you.

You can take this as far as you wish. Make Aphrodite furious and Posideon thrashes the ship per her request... or maybe she is silent.

He thinks you were created by her because you're so pretty. (Just don't say you're prettier than her. That'll get you cursed. 🤗)
